topics.title: Robocop Reboot Series Set at Prime Video
topics.angle: Prime Video orders an eight-episode series based on the classic sci-fi franchise.

sources.headline: Robocop Reboot Series Set at Prime Video
sources.summary: Amazon Prime Video has officially picked up a series version of Robocop, Variety has learned. Prime Video has given the show an eight-episode order. The project has been in development since Amazon acquired MGM in 2022, with Amazon looking to capitalize on their access to MGM’s deep IP library for both film and television projects. [ ]
